testcase.name: Login con qa.candidate01

failure.message: Expected: an element that is not visible but: the element identified by [[ChromeDriver: chrome on WINDOWS (25790b5e9cf8345b958f870ca66add52)] -> id: frmInicioSesion] [¡Bienvenido! Olvidé la contraseña Test Zone × Ingresar] was visible

testcase.failure: Expected: an element that is not visible but: the element identified by [[ChromeDriver: chrome on WINDOWS (25790b5e9cf8345b958f870ca66add52)] -> id: frmInicioSesion] [¡Bienvenido! Olvidé la contraseña Test Zone × Ingresar] was visible
